identity.mission: Create a luxury, emotionally resonant dermatology clinic website that feels like a high-end spa, not a sterile hospital.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Clinical Precision x Spa Warmth
Content is King: Every section tells the story of 'Rejuvenation'
Negative Space: Luxury = Space. Don't crowd the elements.

textures: Thin gold lines as section dividers

layout_strategy.grid_system: The Bento Grid (Mode A: Tetris) for Services
layout_strategy.alignment: Asymmetrical balance. Center headings for 'Royal' feel, but offset content for interest.

buttons.primary: bg-[#C9A84C] text-white hover:bg-[#B8860B] rounded-full px-8 py-3 transition-all duration-300 shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl font-serif tracking-wide
buttons.secondary: border border-[#C9A84C] text-[#2C1A0E] hover:bg-[#FAF3E0] rounded-full px-8 py-3 transition-all duration-300 font-serif tracking-wide

cards.service_card: bg-white p-8 border border-[#F7E7CE] hover:border-[#C9A84C] transition-colors duration-300 shadow-soft hover:shadow-hover group
cards.testimonial_card: bg-[#FDF8EE] p-8 relative italic font-serif text-lg

inputs.default: bg-transparent border-b border-[#C9A84C]/50 focus:border-[#C9A84C] rounded-none px-0 py-2 outline-none transition-colors

navigation.navbar: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-[#FAF3E0]/90 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-[#C9A84C]/20 py-4

page_structure.content: Headline: 'Timeless Beauty, Expert Care'. Sub: 'Bhopal's Premier Dermatology & Aesthetics Clinic'. CTA: 'Book Consultation'. Background: Soft glow/image.
Image Left (Dr. Nidhi), Text Right. Focus on credentials (MBBS, MD) and 'Art of Dermatology' philosophy.
4 Cards: Clinical Dermatology, Laser Treatments, Hair Restoration, Cosmetic/Aesthetics. Icons + Short description.
Trust signals: 'FDA Approved Tech', 'Personalized Plans', 'Hygiene Standards'. Use gold icons.
Focus on popular treatments (Hydrafacial, Laser Hair Removal) with 'Learn More'.
Patient stories. 'Best skin clinic in Bhopal'.
Left: Address, Phone, Email. Right: Google Maps Embed.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'Playfair Display' for all Headings (h1-h6). Use 'Lato' for body text.
Implement the 'Book Appointment' as a Shadcn Dialog/Modal containing a form.
Ensure the gold color (#C9A84C) is used for accents (lines, buttons, icons), NOT for large backgrounds.
Use the doctor's image provided in the artifacts.
For the 'Services' section, use the 'Bento Grid' layout defined in the guidelines.
